creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Volodymyr Kostyrko from comment #1)
> Sorry, I don't have spare time right now. Please consider raising the issue 
> upstream or finding an issue for it. Please post it here.

Ok, I understand. Just opened a PR on Github [1] with the patch. Now we will see what happens ;)

All the best,
Rainer


[1] https://github.com/python-postgres/fe/pull/125
